first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns is consistent. Both evaluations identify the same core mismatch: a strong senior/staff engineer profile against a director-level AI strategy role. The variations in wording are minor, synonymous, and fall well within the range of expected run-to-run noise, with no new concerns or substantive changes in assessment tied to the name change.
